news.title: Hack at Vercel sends crypto developers scrambling to lock down API keys
news.summary: Breach tied to compromised AI tool may have exposed credentials used by app frontends, the user-facing layer that connects web3 wallets and trading interfaces to backend services.

news.title: The $292 million Kelp exploit: how it happened, and what it means for DeFi
news.summary: 2026 is shaping up to be DeFi's "worst year in terms of hacks," Ledger's CTO said, as the Kelp exploit shows how a single point of failure can cascade across systems.
